examples: They include dialogue, synchronous and asynchronous sound effects, and music.
Synchronous sound effects are those sounds which are synchronized or matched with what is viewed.
Synchronous sounds contribute to the realism of film and also help to create a particular atmosphere.
Big geostationary satellites, orbiting 26, 000 miles above the sky, are a lousy two-way synchronous Internet medium.
We spent a huge amount engineering to build totally synchronous gaming for FarmVille with different clients.
